description: Malformed version strings extracted from scan_results.jsonl. A version is considered malformed if it does NOT match the criteria_regex (semver-ish with optional OpenSSL-style single letter suffix).

category_legend.url_fragment: regex captured a URL path/host as the version (rule too greedy)
category_legend.min_suffix: regex captured trailing .min as part of the version
category_legend.hash_like: cachebuster / git short-SHA captured as version
category_legend.major_only: single integer (likely a major-version range alias)
category_legend.non_numeric: pure-text value like website, product (og:type leak)
category_legend.other: does not fit any specific bucket
